Task_Name: Prove Mask Factory mask type mf70_face_full_instance
Detailed_Action: Create contract, mask/map, preview overlay, protected-neighbor checks, routing proof, generated output, and strict QA for mf70_face_full_instance.
Completion_Criteria: mf70_face_full_instance is complete only after contract, owner assignment, generated mask/map, preview overlay, semantic mask-alignment proof, protected-neighbor proof, quality score >=85, workflow routing proof, generated output, whole-artifact visual QA, target-runtime evidence before final certification. Generalized readiness additionally requires reference-image matrix proof and high-resolution detail review where applicable. Protected boundaries must come from a canonical source-derived boundary registry, not from failed, unreviewed, or single-anchor editable masks. Hard promotion gate: no current or future mask is accepted or complete until explicit wave70_mask_promotion_gate_pass evidence exists for this row.; Geometry hard gate: green allowed / amber protected regions must be source-derived, coordinate-consistent, readable, non-conflicting, target-specific, and backed by wave70_mask_geometry_gate_pass evidence.; Model-backed geometry authority hard gate: no mask is accepted, candidate-passed, locally passed, complete, generalized, universal, certification-ready, or target-runtime-ready until exact source/matrix evidence proves model_backed_geometry_authority_pass. Haar/Canny/rectangle-only geometry, symmetry guessing, one-image hardcoded coordinates, and stable low-denoise output do not satisfy mask correctness.; Whole-body geometry authority hard gate: body, hand, finger, hair, body skin, clothing/contact, support-surface, soft-body, video, audio-linked, and body region masks cannot be accepted, candidate-passed, locally passed, complete, generalized, universal, certification-ready, or target-runtime-ready until exact source/matrix evidence proves whole_body_geometry_authority_pass. Prior hand/contact generated-output stability and broad masks do not satisfy mask correctness.; Model-backed geometry authority hard gate: exact source/matrix evidence must require model_backed_geometry_authority_pass and source_derived_landmark_or_segmentation_pass before any mask promotion. Wave70 geometry and promotion hard gates require wave70_mask_geometry_gate_pass and wave70_mask_promotion_gate_pass before any accepted/done/candidate-passed status.
